name: align
description: Single-plugin marketplace for /align — install via /plugin marketplace add ggrigo/align then /plugin install align@align.

plugins.name: align
plugins.description: Personal evals for Claude Code and Cowork. Three skills: /align rates LLM claims (correct/wrong/almost/needs-nuance/can't-verify/skipped) in a local HTML form; /retro synthesizes the archive into failure-mode clusters + gated patches; /diagnose traces wrong claims back to the stale instruction that caused them.
